summary: Tested new endpoints (ruta-hoy, events/recent, events/stats) and Cartera.js redesign. All 14 backend tests passed. All 4 UI tabs functional and rendering correctly on mobile viewport.
critical_code_review_comments: No loanbook data in DB — all tabs show $0 / empty state (expected, not a bug)
Tab icons show on mobile but labels are hidden (sm:block) — by design for mobile, works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints ruta-hoy, events/recent, events/stats all verified. Cartera.js: 4 tabs (Ruta Hoy, Semanal, Mensual, Clientes) all render. Empty states show correctly (no loans in DB). Refresh button works. Payment bottom sheet not tested (no active loans with pending cuotas).
